message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "C1",
      "title": "Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry",
      "description": "Foundational understanding of matter, measurement, and stoichiometry.",
      "competencies": [
        "Understand the importance of chemistry in various fields.",
        "Distinguish between nature of matter and its properties.",
        "Apply principles of measurement including uncertainty analysis.",
        "Utilize laws of chemical combination and Dalton's atomic theory.",
        "Calculate atomic, molecular masses, mole concepts, and molar masses.",
        "Perform stoichiometric calculations and percentage composition analyses."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry",
      "chapter_name": "Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry"
    },
    {
      "code": "C2",
      "title": "Structure of Atom",
      "description": "Evolution from classical models to quantum mechanical understanding.",
      "competencies": [
        "Trace the discovery and identification of sub-atomic particles.",
        "Evaluate historical atomic models leading to modern theory.",
        "Apply Bohr's model for hydrogen atom calculations.",
        "Understand developments leading to the Quantum Mechanical Model."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Structure of Atom",
      "chapter_name": "Structure of Atom"
    },
    {
      "code": "C3",
      "title": "Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties",
      "description": "Systematic organization of elements and analysis of periodic trends.",
      "competencies": [
        "Justify the need for classification of elements.",
        "Analyze the genesis and evolution of periodic classification.",
        "Apply Modern Periodic Law to interpret the current table structure.",
        "Utilize nomenclature rules for elements with atomic number > 100.",
        "Correlate electronic configuration with element types (s, p, d, f blocks).",
        "Predict and explain periodic trends in elemental properties."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties",
      "chapter_name": "Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties"
    },
    {
      "code": "C4",
      "title": "Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure",
      "description": "Mechanisms of bond formation, theory application, and molecular geometry.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply Kossel-Lewis approach to explain chemical bonding.",
        "Differentiate between ionic/electrovalent bonds and other types.",
        "Analyze bond parameters (length, energy, angle).",
        "Predict molecular shapes using VSEPR theory.",
        "Explain bonding via Valence Bond Theory and Hybridisation concepts.",
        "Apply Molecular Orbital Theory to homonuclear diatomic molecules.",
        "Understand the nature and impact of Hydrogen Bonding."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure",
      "chapter_name": "Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure"
    },
    {
      "code": "C5",
      "title": "Chemical Thermodynamics",
      "description": "Energy transformations, enthalpy changes, and spontaneity criteria.",
      "competencies": [
        "Define thermodynamic terms and their applications.",
        "Measure internal energy (∆U) and enthalpy change (∆H) using calorimetry.",
        "Calculate reaction enthalpies for various types of reactions.",
        "Determine the spontaneity of processes based on Gibbs Energy."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Chemical Thermodynamics",
      "chapter_name": "Chemical Thermodynamics"
    },
    {
      "code": "C6",
      "title": "Equilibrium",
      "description": "Dynamic equilibrium in physical and chemical processes.",
      "competencies": [
        "Distinguish between equilibrium in physical and chemical processes.",
        "Apply the Law of Chemical Equilibrium to calculate constants.",
        "Differentiate between homogeneous and heterogeneous equilibria.",
        "Relate Equilibrium Constant (K), Reaction Quotient (Q), and Gibbs Energy (G).",
        "Predict factors affecting equilibrium positions.",
        "Analyze ionic equilibrium in solutions including acids, bases, salts, buffers, and solubility."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Equilibrium",
      "chapter_name": "Equilibrium"
    },
    {
      "code": "C7",
      "title": "Redox Reactions",
      "description": "Electron transfer processes, oxidation numbers, and electrode interactions.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify classical oxidation and reduction reactions.",
        "Analyze redox reactions in terms of electron transfer mechanisms.",
        "Assign and calculate oxidation numbers correctly.",
        "Connect redox concepts to electrode processes."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Redox Reactions",
      "chapter_name": "Redox Reactions"
    },
    {
      "code": "C8",
      "title": "Organic Chemistry: Basic Principles and Techniques",
      "description": "Fundamentals of organic structure, nomenclature, isomerism, and analysis.",
      "competencies": [
        "Represent shapes and structural representations of organic compounds.",
        "Classify organic compounds based on functional groups.",
        "Apply IUPAC nomenclature rules for naming organic compounds.",
        "Identify different types of isomerism in organic molecules.",
        "Understand fundamental concepts of reaction mechanisms.",
        "Execute methods for purification and qualitative/quantitative analysis."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques",
      "chapter_name": "Some basic Principles and Techniques"
    },
    {
      "code": "C9",
      "title": "Hydrocarbons",
      "description": "Classification, properties, and reactions of aliphatic and aromatic hydrocarbons.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify hydrocarbons into Alkanes, Alkenes, Alkynes, and Aromatic types.",
        "Analyze the carcinogenic nature and toxicity associated with certain hydrocarbons."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Hydrocarbons",
      "chapter_name": "Hydrocarbons"
    },
    {
      "code": "C10",
      "title": "Quantitative Estimation (Practical)",
      "description": "Laboratory skills in volumetric analysis and standardization.",
      "competencies": [
        "Operate mechanical/electronic balances for precise mass measurement.",
        "Prepare standard solutions of Oxalic acid and Sodium carbonate.",
        "Determine the strength of unknown NaOH solution via titration with oxalic acid.",
        "Determine the strength of unknown HCl solution via titration with sodium carbonate."
      ],
      "unit_name": "E. Quantitative Estimation",
      "chapter_name": "E. Quantitative Estimation"
    },
    {
      "code": "C11",
      "title": "Qualitative Analysis (Practical)",
      "description": "Identification of ions in salts and detection of elements in organics.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify one anion and one cation from a given salt sample using systematic analysis.",
        "Detect the presence of Nitrogen, Sulphur, or Chlorine in organic compounds."
      ],
      "unit_name": "F. Qualitative Analysis",
      "chapter_name": "F. Qualitative Analysis"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12",
      "title": "Scientific Investigation and Projects (Practical)",
      "description": "Application of chemical principles to real-world environmental and material problems.",
      "competencies": [
        "Design and execute investigations on water quality (bacterial contamination, hardness, purification).",
        "Analyze regional variations in drinking water ions against permissible limits.",
        "Investigate physical properties like foaming capacity and evaporation rates.",
        "Study chemical effects of acids/bases on material tensile strength."
      ],
      "unit_name": "PROJECTS",
      "chapter_name": "PROJECTS"
    },
    {
      "code": "C13",
      "title": "Surface Chemistry (Class XII)",
      "description": "Colloidal states, adsorption phenomena, and emulsions.",
      "competencies": [
        "Distinguish between lyophilic and lyophobic sols and their preparation methods.",
        "Analyze factors affecting gas adsorption on solids."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Surface Chemistry",
      "chapter_name": "Surface Chemistry"
    },
    {
      "code": "C14",
      "title": "General Principles and Processes of Isolation (Class XII)",
      "description": "Extraction methods, concentration techniques, and refining processes.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply principles of oxidation-reduction in extraction."
      ],
      "unit_name": "General Principles and Processes of Isolation",
      "chapter_name": "General Principles and Processes of Isolation"
    },
    {
      "code": "C15",
      "title": "Chromatography (Class XII)",
      "description": "Separation techniques based on differential migration.",
      "competencies": [
        "Perform paper chromatography to separate pigments and determine Rf values."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Chromatography",
      "chapter_name": "Chromatography"
    },
    {
      "code": "C16",
      "title": "Functional Group Analysis (Class XII)",
      "description": "Identification of specific functional groups in organic compounds.",
      "competencies": [
        "Perform tests to identify alcoholic, carboxylic, aldehydic, and ketonic groups."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Tests for the functional groups present in organic compounds",
      "chapter_name": "Tests for the functional groups present in organic compounds"
    },
    {
      "code": "C17",
      "title": "Food Analysis (Class XII)",
      "description": "Detection of biomolecules and adulterants in foodstuffs.",
      "competencies": [
        "Conduct characteristic tests for carbohydrates, fats, and proteins."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Characteristic tests of carbohydrates and proteins",
      "chapter_name": "Characteristic tests of carbohydrates and proteins"
    },
    {
      "code": "C18",
      "title": "Inorganic Compound Preparation (Class XII)",
      "description": "Synthesis of specific inorganic salts.",
      "competencies": [
        "Prepare double salts such as Ferrous Ammonium Sulphate or Potash Alum."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Preparation of Inorganic Compounds",
      "chapter_name": "Preparation of Inorganic Compounds"
    },
    {
      "code": "C19",
      "title": "Organic Compound Preparation (Class XII)",
      "description": "Synthesis of specific organic derivatives.",
      "competencies": [
        "Prepare Acetanilide, Di-benzal acetone, p-Nitroacetanilide, or Aniline yellow."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Preparation of Organic Compounds",
      "chapter_name": "Preparation of Organic Compounds"
    },
    {
      "code": "C20",
      "title": "Quantitative Analysis (Class XII)",
      "description": "Standardization and titration techniques.",
      "competencies": [
        "Prepare standard solutions of Oxalic acid."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Quantitative analysis",
      "chapter_name": "Quantitative analysis"
    }
  ]
}
